name: Winnsboro State Bank & Trust Company
description_short: Winnsboro State Bank & Trust Company is a Louisiana-based community bank serving customers across five locations with deposit accounts, lending products, and investment services.
description_long:
Winnsboro State Bank & Trust Company was established in 1902 and has operated continuously for over 120 years as a community-focused financial institution in Louisiana. The bank began with assets of $20,000 and has grown to $370 million in assets as of March 31, 2025. Originally headquartered in the former offices of The Franklin Sun newspaper in Winnsboro, the bank has expanded its physical infrastructure multiple times over its history while maintaining its commitment to local banking relationships.

WSB offers a comprehensive suite of banking products and services including personal and business checking and savings accounts, investment services, mortgages, lines of credit, real estate financing, and construction lending. The bank provides online banking access and a mobile app for 24/7 account management. Personal customers can access traditional deposit accounts and mortgage products, while business and agricultural customers have access to specialized lending products including lines of credit and construction financing. All deposits are FDIC-insured.

The bank distinguishes itself through its emphasis on personal relationships and local decision-making. With a 120+ year operating history and five full-service Louisiana locations (Winnsboro, Gilbert, Mangham, Rayville, and Ruston), WSB positions itself as a hometown bank where customers interact with people they know and trust rather than corporate call centers. The bank's longevity and consistent asset growth demonstrate stability and customer retention within its regional market.

WSB is a traditional community bank with geographic limitations to Louisiana. While the bank offers modern digital banking tools (online banking and mobile app), it lacks the product breadth or national reach of larger institutions. Customers should verify specific product availability at their local branch and understand that rates and terms may differ from larger competitors. The bank's regional focus is an asset for those seeking local relationships but a limitation for customers requiring services outside Louisiana. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Over 120 years of continuous banking operation since 1902, demonstrating stability
Five full-service branch locations across Louisiana for in-person service
Assets of $370 million provide substantial institutional backing
24/7 mobile app access for account management and banking convenience
Specialized lending products for agriculture and construction industries
Community-focused banking with local decision-making and relationship banking approach
cons: Geographic limitation to five Louisiana locations only—not available nationwide
Limited product information on website regarding specific rates, fees, or loan terms
No mention of competitive advantages in pricing or product terms versus larger regional/national banks
Smaller institution may have fewer advanced financial products compared to major banks
Limited transparency about minimum account balances or promotional offerings
best_for: Louisiana residents seeking local community banking relationships and personalized service
Small business and agricultural customers needing specialized lending in Louisiana
Customers prioritizing FDIC-insured savings and checking accounts with in-person banking access
Long-term customers valuing established institution stability and local decision-making
diagnosis: Winnsboro State Bank & Trust Company is best for Louisiana residents and business owners seeking traditional community banking with local relationships and personalized service. The main caveat is that this is a regional institution limited to five Louisiana locations, making it unsuitable for customers outside that geographic area or those requiring nationwide banking services.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
